backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for an upcoming cars platform, with CRUD operations for cars and news articles, user ratings, newsletter subscriptions, and car comparison functionality using in-memory maps.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping feature IDs to their titles, associated source files, component dependencies, and test IDs, serving as evidence of implemented features for the build planner.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Upcoming Cars', mounting the app at the #root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for Home, Car Detail, Cars Search, News Listing, News Detail, Comparison, and Admin pages, wrapped in a shared Layout with Navbar and Footer.
frontend/src/components/CarCard.tsx: Reusable card component that displays a car's image, EV/petrol badge, trending flag, brand, name, expected price, launch date, and range or mileage with a link to the car detail page.
frontend/src/components/CarFilters.tsx: Sidebar filter panel component for the cars search page, providing controls to filter cars by type (EV/petrol/all), price range slider, brand dropdown, and launch year dropdown with a clear-all option.
frontend/src/components/CarForm.tsx: A form component for creating or editing a car entry, including fields for specs, features, images (with upload progress), and validation. Contains a reusable ArrayInput sub-component for managing list-type fields like pros, cons, and features.
frontend/src/components/CarSelector.tsx: A searchable dropdown component for selecting a car from a list, supporting exclusion of a specific car by ID and displaying EV/Petrol type badges.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component displaying the brand logo, quick navigation links, news categories, social media icons, and a brief about section.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: A hero banner component that auto-rotates through featured cars every 5 seconds, showing car image, type badge, price, and CTA links; falls back to a static banner when no featured cars are available.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx: An image gallery component with a main display, prev/next navigation, dot indicators, and a thumbnail strip; falls back to a placeholder image on error or when no images are provided.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a fixed Navbar at the top, a scrollable main content area via Outlet, and a Footer at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with scroll-aware background blur, active link highlighting, a theme toggle, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/NewsCard.tsx: Renders a single news article as a styled card with image, category badge, title, excerpt, date, and first tag, linking to the article detail page.
frontend/src/components/NewsForm.tsx: A form component for creating or editing a news article, supporting title, category, content, image upload with progress, and tag management with validation.
frontend/src/components/NewsletterForm.t: An email newsletter subscription form with validation, loading state, and simulated success/error feedback (no real backend call).
frontend/src/components/NewsSlider.tsx: A horizontally scrollable slider of news article cards with left/right navigation buttons, loading skeletons, and an empty state message.
frontend/src/components/SocialShareButto: Renders share buttons for WhatsApp, Twitter/X, and Facebook using the current or provided URL, plus a native Web Share API button when available.
frontend/src/components/StarRatingWidget: Displays an average star rating and allows users to submit a new rating via an interactive 1–5 star selector with loading and success states.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A button that toggles between dark and light themes using the ThemeContext, displaying a Sun or Moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/components/TrendingCarsGrid: Renders a responsive grid of CarCard components for trending cars, with skeleton loading placeholders and an empty state message.
frontend/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx: Provides a React context for dark/light theme state, persisting the preference to localStorage and applying the theme class to the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching, searching, filtering cars and news articles, as well as admin mutations for adding, updating, and deleting cars and news.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS with custom OKLCH-based design tokens for light/dark automotive themes, and defines reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class name merging, formatting prices in INR (lakhs/crores), formatting timestamps as dates, extracting car/article image URLs, truncating text, and debouncing functions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabbed UI for managing cars and news articles, supporting add, edit, and delete operations via mutation hooks with inline success/error feedback.
frontend/src/pages/CarDetailPage.tsx: Displays a detailed view of a single car including image gallery, specs, pricing, EV/petrol badge, star rating, and social share buttons, fetched by car ID from the route params.
frontend/src/pages/CarsSearchPage.tsx: Provides a searchable, filterable car listing page with debounced text search, filter sidebar, and dynamic results sourced from all-cars, search, or filter queries depending on active state.
frontend/src/pages/ComparisonPage.tsx: Renders a side-by-side car comparison page where users select two cars and see spec rows with 'Better' badges highlighting the winning value for each metric.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Assembles the home page with a hero section, ad banners, latest news slider, trending cars grid, EV vs petrol section, brand logos, and a newsletter form using data from car and article queries.
frontend/src/pages/NewsDetailPage.tsx: Shows a full article page with cover image, category badge, tags, formatted content paragraphs, and social share buttons, fetched by article ID from route params.
frontend/src/pages/NewsListingPage.tsx: Lists all news articles in a filterable grid with category tab pills, sorted by publish date, with skeleton loading states and an ad banner.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch variables), fonts (Rajdhani, Inter), border radii, shadows, keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor for 'Upcoming Cars', an Indian automotive news/marketing website, documenting schema version, architectural notes, existing features, required images, and known issues across the full-stack application.
